title: CheckIt Occupancy Platform
description: A real-time room occupancy platform using sensors, databases, and a web dashboard to help students see room availability.

title: MyVitto Digital Business Card
description: A digital business card platform built for businesses, schools, and professionals to share contact information more efficiently.

title: Media Bias Analysis Tool
description: A sentiment analysis project studying how media outlets may show political bias through non-political topics.

title: Processed Foods Visualization
description: A DSC 106 visualization showing which stores have the most highly processed food items.

title: NYPD Complaints Visualization
description: A persuasive visualization project using NYPD complaint data to communicate different arguments.

title: McDonald's Nutrition Analysis
description: A data analysis project exploring calories, nutrients, correlations, and patterns in McDonald's menu data.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Resume Page
description: A webpage that embeds a PDF resume directly into the site.

title: Theme Switcher
description: A JavaScript feature that allows users to switch between light, dark, and automatic color schemes.

title: Contact Form
description: A contact page with a mailto form that sends subject and message data through URL parameters.

title: Micromobility Speed Sensor
description: A concept for using sensors and dashboards to help UCSD monitor e-bike and scooter speeding.

title: Arcade Room Occupancy Prototype
description: A prototype idea for detecting whether shared community machines and rooms are currently in use.
